name: audit-loop
description: Run a focused multi-agent audit before execution to find blockers, risks, and agreement gaps.

interface.shortDescription: Audit plans for blockers and meaningful risks before execution.
interface.longDescription: Guides Codex through a focused audit loop that checks user intent, implementation agreements, and codebase context for blockers, risky assumptions, missing requirements, integration issues, and test gaps before execution starts.
defaultPrompt: Use audit-loop to audit this plan:
